name: Sloppy BBQ Joes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground beef in a skillet until it is well browned.
2. Add the diced green onion and cook until the vegetables are tender.
3. Drain any excess fat from the meat mixture.
4. Stir in the BBQ sauce, ketchup, relish, salt, and pepper into the meat mixture.
5. Simmer the mixture for a few minutes, stirring often.
6. Spoon the meat mixture onto toasted hamburger buns.
SERVES 4.
